Package actrie

Class KeywordTextMatcher

java.lang.Object
actrie.KeywordTextMatcher
public class KeywordTextMatcher
extends java.lang.Object
StringDictionaryMatcher implements the basic use case of the AhoCorasickTrie. It finds all matches of the keywords used in its construction in the text body.

Example Usage: 

   
   StringDictionaryMatcher matcher = StringDictionaryMatcher.createFromParameters(
         LanguageParameterFactory.defaultParameter, dictionary);
   List<Match> matches = matcher.matchText(text);
Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static KeywordTextMatcher createFromParameters​(LanguageParameter parameters, java.util.List<java.lang.String> keywords)
    Creates a new KeywordTextMatcher from a LanguageParameter and the keywords we want to match.
    java.util.List<Match> matchText​(java.lang.String text)
    Returns all Matches of the keywords we found in the text.

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • createFromParameters

      public static KeywordTextMatcher createFromParameters​(LanguageParameter parameters, java.util.List<java.lang.String> keywords)
      Creates a new KeywordTextMatcher from a LanguageParameter and the keywords we want to match.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the LanguageParameter we are using
      keywords - the keywords we want to match with
      Returns:
      the new KeywordTextMatcher

    • matchText

      public java.util.List<Match> matchText​(java.lang.String text)
      Returns all Matches of the keywords we found in the text.
      Parameters:
      text - String - the text body we want to search
      Returns:
      a list of Matches found
